## Behavior

Describe the user-visible contract and affected platforms.

## Verification

- [ ] Regression test failed before the implementation and passes now
- [ ] `yarn check`
- [ ] Android unit/lint/APK when Android is affected
- [ ] iOS build when iOS or shared code is affected
- [ ] Web production build when Web or shared code is affected
- [ ] Release-mode trace or benchmark when performance is affected

## Compatibility

List API, dependency, minimum OS, accessibility, RTL, virtualization, and
state-restoration effects. Breaking changes require a changelog entry.
